136:170.notes: Treat the Tehran IRP headquarters bombing as a one-off location-specific attack event during the post-prediction window.

136:202.notes: Treat the second Tehran leadership bombing as a one-off post-anchor attack after the first Tehran bombing.

206:5.notes: Treat the 11 September 2001 United States attacks as a one-off mass-casualty terror event within the long post-prediction horizon.

393:8.notes: Treat the 7 July 2005 London transport bombings as a one-off city transport attack in the immediate post-prediction days.

394:3.notes: Keep a probability record for the follow-on London bombing row even though final adjudication retires it for the stored 2004/2005 chronology conflict.

400:1.notes: Treat the 1 October 2005 Bali bombings as a one-off tourist-district attack in the immediate post-prediction window.

400:21.notes: Treat the Nalchik raid as a one-off named-city security-target attack in the days after the report.

668:2.notes: Treat the Berlin Christmas market vehicle attack as a one-off named-market attack in the immediate post-prediction window.
